== Notes for [[Item:Q111244|Q111244]] ==

unknown:
*NOT the DUP name of https://www.geni.com/people/Radegund-von-Th%C3%BCringen/6000000011540372224 ex-wife of Chlothar

*whit the JPG of her sister https://www.geni.com/people/Ar%C3%A9gonde-Queen-of-the-Franks/6000000001354338841 wife of Chlothar

(the whole node seems to be the result of abandoned, inherited and untreated random merges. In the meantime moved the children down here, to fix over there, but here too everything needs to be examined and documented!)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
